overall.description: A cinematic view of a grand Gothic dining hall from a video game, featuring floating candles, towering stained glass windows, and students in dark robes seated at long house tables. Warm golden sunlight streams through the windows illuminating the stone interior, while the camera remains stationary observing the ambient activity of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall dining area with long house tables and floating candles

agents.ego_description: standing still at the side of the great hall observing the students dining and conversing at the house tables

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting at the table eating and conversing with others
student in white robes partially visible in the foreground, seated at the table

entered.detail: tall Gothic arched windows with intricate colored glass patterns allowing golden sunlight to stream into the hall
numerous hanging candle chandeliers suspended in mid-air providing warm ambient lighting throughout the hall
lengthy wooden house tables lined with plates, goblets, and food items, occupied by students
large stone Gothic archway and balcony structure on the right side of the hall
decorative banners hanging from the upper walls near the stained glass windows

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady cinematic view of a grand Gothic great hall filled with students dining at long wooden tables. Golden morning sunlight streams through towering stained glass windows on the left, illuminating the stone interior and floating candle chandeliers above. Students in dark robes sit eating and conversing throughout the hall, creating a dense but calm atmosphere typical of a magical school dining room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a grand Gothic dining hall where morning light defines a serene academic atmosphere. It begins by capturing the vast scale of the stone interior, focusing on students in dark robes seated at long wooden tables. As the eye wanders, the scene emphasizes the interplay of light and shadow, with golden sunlight streaming through towering stained glass windows to illuminate the space. The view then expands upward toward floating candle chandeliers that drift above the conversing students, finally settling into a comprehensive observation of the calm, magical environment.
